name: HOUSENKA NO JUTSU (MYTHICAL PHOENIX FIRE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: C, E, H

You rapidly spit out a small fireball, which deals 2d6 fire damage (Reflex negates). If a creature is hit for at least 15 fire damage by a single use of this technique, it must make a second Reflex save to avoid catching on fire.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to create an additional fireball (up to 1 per 2 levels total), which may target the same creature or square, or a different one. Spend 1 Chakra per fireball to increase the damage by 1d6.

You must empower all fireballs equally, and any single creature cannot be targeted by more than 1d6 per level worth of fireballs.
